name: EPIPLOIC APPENDAGITIS
definition: rare self-limiting inflammation of one of 50-100 epiploic / omental appendages

demographics.Associated with: obesity, rapid recent weight loss, hernia, unaccustomed exercise
demographics.Histo: acute infarction with fat necrosis, inflammation, thrombosed vessels with hemorrhagic

dominant_finding: pericolic oval-shaped pedunculated mass of fat attenuation (~ -60 HU):
discriminating_features: oval fatty lesion commonly adjacent to sigmoid colon:

clinical.Cx: adhesion, bowel obstruction, intussusception, peritonitis, abscess, intraperitoneal calcified
clinical.Prognosis: spontaneous resolution within 2 weeks clinically + within 6 months on CT
